purpose: Evaluate whether a row-owned Triton weighted-scatter score-gradient reducer fixes the current-source no-mHC standard-EP fault without falling back to Torch for grad_scores.

code_change.row_kernel_contract: One Triton program owns a row block, loops over hidden-dimension chunks, accumulates grad_scores[row] locally, and writes once instead of cross-column atomic-adding into grad_scores.
code_change.empty_shape_guard: Return early from weighted-scatter backward when n_rows == 0 or dim == 0.

isolated_probe.read: The row-owned reducer is a real single-op speedup in isolation, about 1.44x over the scoretorch split at this synthetic production-like shape.

production_shape_profile.read: The real production standard-EP combine shape is hidden=4096 with about 56k-103k routed rows, not the earlier synthetic hidden=7168 probe. Weighted scatter remains the largest combine substage in this timing profile.

exact_shape_isolated_probes.read: The row-owned reducer passes the actual observed production max-row shape in both single-GPU and eight-rank isolated probes. The integrated training fault is therefore context/lifetime/graph specific rather than a simple dimension or concurrent-rank shape miss.

score_zero_integrated_diagnostic.shape: 8xMI350 MBS4 GA4 GBS128 S4096 no-AC standard EP top8 no-mHC
score_zero_integrated_diagnostic.read: Disabling only grad_scores while keeping the Triton grad_src path lets the full training graph complete a step. This isolates the crash to score-gradient production.

normal_row_hot_torch_custom_integrated_d.shape: 8xMI350 MBS4 GA4 GBS128 S4096 no-AC standard EP top8 no-mHC
normal_row_hot_torch_custom_integrated_d.failure: HSA memory access faults in backward before any metric step; torchrun root local_rank 5 exited with SIGABRT and the other ranks were terminated.
normal_row_hot_torch_custom_integrated_d.read: Forcing the hot-helper weighted scatter to Torch does not rescue row score mode. This rules out the hot-helper scatter caller as the integrated-only culprit and leaves the normal standard-EP combine score-gradient path as the active failing edge.

row_bm4_integrated_diagnostic.shape: 8xMI350 MBS4 GA4 GBS128 S4096 no-AC standard EP top8 no-mHC
row_bm4_integrated_diagnostic.failure: HSA memory access faults in backward before any metric step; torchrun root local_rank 1 exited with SIGABRT and the other ranks were terminated.
row_bm4_integrated_diagnostic.post_run_rocm_smi: After teardown, all eight GPUs returned to 0% allocated VRAM.
row_bm4_integrated_diagnostic.read: Batching four score rows per Triton program does not fix the integrated fault. This rejects simple one-row program launch pressure as the root cause and keeps the failing edge narrowed to integrated normal-combine score-gradient production.

integrated_gates.shape: 8xMI350 MBS4 GA4 GBS128 S4096 no-AC standard EP top8 no-mHC
integrated_gates.failure: HSA memory access fault in backward before completing the first metric step

integrated_gates.shape: 8xMI350 MBS4 GA4 GBS128 S4096 no-AC standard EP top8 no-mHC
integrated_gates.failure: HSA memory access fault in backward before completing the first metric step, after adding the empty-shape guard

integrated_gates.shape: 8xMI350 MBS4 GA4 GBS128 S4096 no-AC standard EP top8 no-mHC
integrated_gates.failure: HSA memory access fault in backward before completing the first metric step

post_failure_baseline_sanity.post_run_rocm_smi: After a short teardown delay, all eight GPUs returned to about 286 MiB VRAM and 0% GPU use; rocm-smi --showpids reported only gpuagent with 0 VRAM.

decision: Do not promote triton_split, triton_row, or triton_row_bm4. The MI350 node is healthy for the stable no-mHC baseline path; the failing edge remains the integrated Triton weighted-scatter score-gradient reducer at production standard-EP normal-combine scale.
